name: Poodle Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Gradually add flour and salt to the melted margarine, stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Slowly incorporate tomatoes, baking soda, and scalded milk while continuing to stir.
4. Cook the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until it thickens slightly.
5. Add the weiner rounds to the saucepan.
6. Serve the poodle toast over hot slices of toast.
Makes 4 servings.
